lis3dhtr_init.tooltip: Initialize LIS3DHTR accelerometer (I2C mode), default address 0x18. ⚠️ Wio Terminal must use Wire1

lis3dhtr_init_simplified.message0: all-in-one init LIS3DHTR I2C %1 address %2 data rate %3 range %4 high res %5
lis3dhtr_init_simplified.tooltip: One-step LIS3DHTR init and config: init + data rate + range + high resolution. Recommended read interval ≥ 50ms

lis3dhtr_get_acceleration.tooltip: Read acceleration value for the specified axis (unit: g)

lis3dhtr_get_acceleration_xyz.tooltip: Read all three axes at once and store to specified variables

lis3dhtr_available.tooltip: Check if new accelerometer data is available

lis3dhtr_get_temperature.tooltip: Read temperature data, enable temperature sensor first

lis3dhtr_is_connection.tooltip: Check if LIS3DHTR sensor is properly connected (device ID == 0x33)

lis3dhtr_reset.tooltip: Reset LIS3DHTR sensor to default state

lis3dhtr_on_tap.message0: on %1 tap detected threshold %2 interrupt pin %3
lis3dhtr_on_tap.tooltip: Configure tap detection and interrupt handler. Recommended thresholds: 2G range 40-80, 4G 20-40, 8G 10-20, 16G 5-10
